nodes.name: Myzomela
nodes.summary: Myzomela（Myzomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如Drab myzomela、White-chinned myzomela、Ruby-throated myzomela等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sclater's myzomela
nodes.summary: Sclater's myzomela (Myzomela sclateri) or the scarlet-bibbed myzomela, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea (Karkar and smaller islands). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
